title: N,O-Schiff Base Ru/Ir Library
description: 176 N,O-Schiff-base compounds from a combinatorial library across two half-sandwich metal scaffolds (Ir Cp*, Ru cymene), screened for antibacterial activity against S. aureus and E. coli, and cytotoxicity against HEK293T cells.
